name: /spec emitted tests cite their grounding source_file and docs_url in the test header comment
command:
mkdir -p tests profiles generated-code-quality-standards/google && printf 'source:
  id: google-tsguide
  authoritative_url: https://google.github.io/styleguide/tsguide.html
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
    detector: x
    docs_url: https://google.github.io/styleguide/tsguide.html#x
' > generated-code-quality-standards/google/tsguide.yaml && printf 'extends: [google:tsguide]
' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/spec.sh" "feature x" --profile profiles/p.yaml --root generated-code-quality-standards --tests-out tests --feature-id feat-x 2>err.txt && grep -q 'source_file: google/tsguide.yaml' tests/feat-x.test.* && grep -q 'docs_url: https://google.github.io' tests/feat-x.test.* && echo ok 1>&2
